verses.text: Ka ta aw, kong thuhilhte mangngilh kei in la, kong thugente phawk tawntung in
Kong thuhilhte in na khan' hong sausak ding a, hong daupaisak ding hi
Thumanna leh cihtakna khahsuah ngei kei in la, na ngawngah tuate okin, na lungtang tungah gelh in
Tua hi leh, Pasian' mai leh mite' mai-ah maipha ngahin na ma vang ding hi
Na lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa muang in la, nang' theihna suang kei in
Na hihna khempeuhah amah phawk in. Tua hi leh lampi man amah in hong lak ding hi
Nangmah a pilin kingaihsun tawm kei in la, Topa zahtakin a sia peel in
Tua hi leh nang-a' dingin damna zatui tawh kibang ding a, na meimate hong damsakin na natnate hong daisak ding hi
Na neihsa leh na anpalte tawh Topa zahtak in
Tua hi leh na ansalte an tawh kidim ding a, beel dimletin leenggahzu na nei ding hi
Ka ta aw, Topa' thuhilhna limtakin ngai-in, hong tainate thudon in
Bang hang hiam cih leh pa in a pahtak a tapa a thuhilh bangin Topa in a it mite a thuhilh hi
Pilna nei-in thu a thei mipa, a lungdam mi ahi hi
Pilna nei leeng ngun sangin hoihzaw a, kham sangin zong manpha zaw hi
A manpha pen suangmanpha nangawn sangin pilna manpha zaw lai a, mihingte' deihtheih na lakah tehpih theih ding omlo hi
Pilna in khan' hong sausak a, hauhna leh pahtawina zong hong piathuah lai hi
Pilna in nuntakna hong nuamsak a, lungmuang takin hong omsak den hi
Pilna a nei mite a lungdam mi hi a, pilna a nei mite nuntakna singkung tawh kibang uh hi
Topa in pilna tawh leitung bawl a, a theihtelna tawh vantung a bawl hi
Ama pilna in guntuite luangsak a, meiite in leitungah guah zusak hi
Ka ta aw, pilna leh thu ngaihsut theihna len tawntung in la, cikmah ciangin khahsuah ngei kei in
Tuate pen nang-a' dingin nuntakna hi ding a, na hoihna dingin kizepna hi ding hi
Tua hi leh lungmuang takin na nungta ding a, pukna ding thu bangmah omlo ding hi
Launa omloin nuamtakin na lum ding a, zan tawntung lungmuang takin na ihmu thei ding hi
Migilote tungah huihpi bangin siatna a tun' ciangin, nang na lunghihmawhna ding bangmah omlo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a muan'huai-in nang hong kem ding a, siatna hong tuaksaklo ding hi
Na hihzawh ding ahih nak leh midangte' kitangsapna huh tawntung in
Na vaihawmsak theihpah ding thute ahih nak leh, zing ciangin hong paikik in, ci-in a hun sotto kei in
Nangmah hong muangin nangma nai-ah a hong teng na vengpa, gim a ngahna ding bangmah vaihawm kei in
Nangma tungah siatna bangmah a hong bawllo, mi khatpeuh tawh thu omlopi-in kimawk tot kei in
A ngongtat thei mite engkha kei in la, amau' gamtat bangin gamtakha kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in a sia-in a gamtate mudah a, thuman mite bek a pawlpih dingin a la hi
Topa in migilote' innsung samsia a, thuman mite' innsung thupha a pia hi
Amah in mi kihisakte bangmahin simlo a, a kiniamkhiatte tungah maipha a pia hi
Mipilte in minphatna leh pahtawina ngah ding uh a, mihaite in maizumna leh mindaina ngah ding uh hi.
